rationale: Same corpus 'Mid' bucket as L3 (16 points across Adyen/Axon/Cisco/GitLab/Samsara). File's L4 base p50 $158K sits within the corpus range ($66K-$240K) and above the corpus median, consistent with L4 being senior to the blended 'Mid' bucket. Keeping medium; not raised to high due to the same L3/L4 blending issue in the corpus level_hint.
